case_title: KEN QING QIANG CHEN VS. Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2025 VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KEN QING QIANG CHEN. DEFENDANT Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR, INC. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, KEN QING QIANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,890.00 FILED BY CHEN, KEN QING QIANG AS TO DEFENDANT Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
